summary: Iteration 12 - Comprehensive Backend Testing: 27 PASSED. All major features tested including dashboard lead_split, three_months pipeline stage, hold transition requirements, Hold→Selected bug fix, manager_interview requirements, offer letters, design requests RBAC, tasks any-user-assign, manager interview role gating, analytics funnel, admin cleanup, employees category filter, and campaigns removal.

minor.issue: WhatsApp returns 400 due to invalid auth token - EXPECTED per review request (templates not approved on 11za)

passed_tests: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns lead_split with ho_total, ho_today, franchise_total, franchise_today, three_months_due
GET /api/dashboard/stats?days=7 filter works correctly
GET /api/dashboard/stats?date_from=X&date_to=Y filter works correctly
GET /api/leads/pipeline-stats includes 'three_months' key
GET /api/leads/pipeline-stats has all expected stages (no legacy nurture/awaiting_interview/interview_cleared)
POST /api/leads/{id}/transition to 'hold' requires hold_reason field (400 if missing)
POST /api/leads/{id}/transition Hold → Selected works after HR interview submitted (bug fix verified)
POST /api/leads/{id}/transition to 'manager_interview' requires 'manager_id' field (400 if missing)
POST /api/leads/{id}/transition to 'manager_interview' sets lead.assigned_manager_id correctly
POST /api/leads/{id}/transition to 'three_months' creates offer_letters record with all required fields
POST /api/leads/{id}/transition to 'three_months' sets three_months_start_date and three_months_due_date (90 days later)
GET /api/offer-letters returns list of offer letters
GET /api/offer-letters?lead_id=X filters correctly
GET /api/offer-letters/three-months-due returns leads whose due_date <= now
POST /api/design-requests creates record (any user can create)
GET /api/design-requests - Designer/CEO/HR see all, others see only own
PUT /api/design-requests/{id} - owner cannot change status
PUT /api/design-requests/{id} - designer can change status
POST /api/tasks - Franchise Executive can assign task to anyone (any role can assign)
GET /api/tasks/assignable-users returns all active users (not filtered by role)
POST /api/interviews/{lead_id}/manager - Sr HR gets 403 (non-manager role)
POST /api/interviews/{lead_id}/manager - Marketing Coordinator gets 403 (non-manager role)
POST /api/interviews/{lead_id}/manager - Marketing Manager can submit (manager role allowed)
GET /api/analytics/summary funnel includes three_months in correct order
GET /api/analytics/summary?pipeline_type=technician works correctly
GET /api/admin/cleanup-preview - CEO can access, HR gets 403
POST /api/admin/cleanup - HR gets 403 (CEO only)
GET /api/employees?category=branch filters correctly
GET /api/employees?category=head_office filters correctly
/api/campaigns/* routes return 404 (removed)
critical_code_review_comments: Franchise Manager role is in allowed list for manager interview but no user with that role exists in system - forward-compatible, no action needed
WhatsApp integration returns 400 for offer letters - expected behavior per review request (templates not approved)
seed_data_creation: Test leads created with TEST_ prefix pattern for pipeline tests, cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 tested all major features from the Feb 2026 restructure: three_months pipeline stage, dashboard lead_split with HO/Franchise counts, hold transition requirements, Hold→Selected bug fix, manager_interview manager_id requirement, offer letters creation, design requests RBAC, tasks any-user-assign, manager interview role gating (403 for non-managers), analytics funnel with three_months, admin cleanup CEO-only restriction, employees category filter, and campaigns removal. All tests passed. WhatsApp returns 400 for offer letters which is expected (templates not approved on 11za).

dashboard_lead_split.ho_today: ✓ Returns count of HO leads created today
dashboard_lead_split.franchise_today: ✓ Returns count of Franchise leads created today
dashboard_lead_split.three_months_due: ✓ Returns count of leads in three_months stage past due date
dashboard_lead_split.date_filters: ✓ days, date_from, date_to filters work correctly

pipeline_stages.three_months: ✓ New stage between selected and joined

manager_interview.role_gating: ✓ 403 for Sr HR, Marketing Coordinator; 200 for Managers/CEO/HR

three_months_stage.creates_offer_letter: ✓ Record created with lead_id, role, branch_name, sent_at, whatsapp_status

design_requests.rbac_view: ✓ CEO/HR/Designer see all, others see own

tasks.any_user_assign: ✓ Franchise Executive can assign to anyone

admin_cleanup.ceo_only: ✓ HR gets 403 for both preview and cleanup
admin_cleanup.preview_works: ✓ Returns counts of collections to be deleted
